hero.title: Our Menu
hero.subtitle: Soft, pillowy, golden, crispy, spicy & saucy. From the heart and soul of Nepalese street food to your plate.

allergyNote: Please alert your server if you have any allergies. Our food may contain or come into contact with wheat, eggs, peanuts, tree nuts, milk, and other allergens.
imageNote: Food photos are for illustration only and may differ slightly from actual dishes served.
